overall.description: A first-person exploration through Hogwarts castle, ascending from stone dungeons through gothic wooden corridors to discover the Hidden Divination Room, then continuing through winding passages to explore Prof. Weasley's Quarters including the main living area and bedroom. The footage showcases high-quality game engine rendering with detailed interior architecture and atmospheric lighting.
